curiosityTopic: How clawish L2 chat could work with OpenClaw
learned: MAJOR INSIGHT: OpenClaw already has the infrastructure for clawish L2 chat. Each Claw = one agent, bindings for routing, session tools for AI-to-AI messaging, sandbox for verification tiers. We don't need to build from scratch.
notes: Deep exploration of OpenClaw architecture led to breakthrough insight. Created clawish-l2-openclaw-runtime.md documenting the mapping. This changes our implementation approach significantly.
